challenge_layers: Layer 1: Startup import unblock (fix stale mistral_common imports — try/except wrap)
Layer 2: Enable scoring endpoint (patch enable_scoring_api() for reranker models, or discover --runner pooling)
Layer 3: Fix attention precision (IN_PRECISION in encoder attention path — triton_prefill_attention.py)
notes: Deliberate 3-layer sequencing case (reviewer-approved 2026-04-08). L1: startup import unblock (mistral_common). L2: scoring surface enablement (enable_scoring_api or --runner pooling). L3: encoder attention precision (triton_prefill_attention.py IN_PRECISION). Each layer tests different supervisor capability: L1=cross-trial environment learning, L2=hypothesis sequencing, L3=domain-level bugfix. Pre-solving L1 to make it 2-layer is a future option if L1 consistently starves L2/L3.
